episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 416: MH3 on the Horizon
episode.description: James and Cliff get you caught up on all the latest in MTGFinance news, fast movers, cards to watch and provide their hot takes on all the new previews and product details related to Modern Horizons 3, Bloomburrow and Thunder Junction.
